name: manga-recap-webtool
description: Skills for building a full-web manga/webtoon recap tool with virtual-strip architecture, scene detection, worker optimization, cross-image extraction, and crop editor UX.

interface.shortDescription: Skills for virtual-strip, scene detect, extract, and crop UX.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin for a full-web manga/webtoon recap tool. It helps Codex reason about coordinate systems, scene crop suggestions, worker-safe image processing, cross-image extraction, and crop editor UX.
